text: My best travel decision was planning a solo trip to Vietnam last year. Before leaving, I researched local customs and learned a few basic phrases. Once there, I was amazed by the bustling street markets and the incredible food—especially the fresh spring rolls and steaming bowls of pho. Although I sometimes struggled with the language barrier, using hand gestures and smiles helped me connect with kind locals. I returned home with not just souvenirs, but unforgettable memories of vibrant cities, serene landscapes, and warm hospitality. That trip taught me that stepping into a new culture, even with a few challenges, is always worth the effort.
